title: Telecommunications in the Czech Republic
content: Telephones - main lines in use: 2.888 million (2006) Telephones - mobile cellular: 13.075 million (2007) Telephone system: <br "domestic:" 86% of exchanges now digital; existing copper subscriber systems now being improved with Asymmetric Digital Subscriber Line (ADSL) equipment to accommodate Internet and other digital signals; trunk systems include <a href="fibre-optic%20cable" fibre-optic cable</a and <a href="microwave%20radio%20relay" microwave radio relay</a Indian Ocean regions), 1 Intelsat, 1 Eutelsat, 1 Inmarsat, 1 Globalstar Radio broadcast stations: AM 31, FM 304, shortwave 17 (2000) Radios: 3,159,134 (December 2000) Television broadcast stations: 150 (plus 1,434 repeaters) (2000) Televisions: 3,405,834 (December 2000) Internet Service Providers (ISPs): more than 300 (2000) Internet users: 4.4 million (2007) <a href="Country%20code" Country code</a: CZ
